diesel-winter-sweets.name: Diesel: Winter Sweets

findings: 0.831 COLD ROOT CAUSE CONFIRMED: she makes 0 bursts in graded comp N5 (Privaty/SWHA alternate, never reach slot 5) -> stays in HIGHLIGHT -> sustained should be 235.03% not hard-coded Intro 60.19% -> fixing = 0.831->~0.92 (+real FB ~0.96). COMP-DEPENDENT (Run D leftmost-B3 -> Intro was right there). Fix: chainGate selfCast/selfNotCast on fullBurstEnter+target self

skill1: Activates when entering Full Burst for the first time without using own Burst Skill. Affects self.
Highlight: Critical damage ▲ 20.28% continuously. This effect cannot be removed. Effect persists after revival.
Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects self if in Highlight status.
skill2: Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects all allies (except self).
Mute: Gains immunity to Noise Pollution continuously. Stacks up to 3 times.
Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects self.
burst: Activates while the skill user is in Highlight status. Affects all allies (except self).
Noise Pollution: Hit Rate ▼ 100% for 1 sec.
Affects all allies if the skill user is in Highlight status.

caveats: skill2: unparsed effect "Mute: Gains immunity to Noise Pollution continuously. Stacks up to 3 times."
skill2: unsupported trigger "Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects all allies (except self)." — its effects are skipped
